tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Song: SWEET DREAMS
By: BEYONCE



Turn the lights on


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Every night I rush to my bed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
With hopes that maybe I'll get a chance to see you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
When I close my eyes I'm going out of my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]                                         
Lost in a fairytale, can you hold my hands and be my guide?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  Clouds filled with stars cover the skies[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]   
  And I hope it rains, you're the perfect lullaby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  What kinda dream is this?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
You could be a sweet dream or a beautiful nightmare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
  Either way I don't wanna wake up from you[/tab]
(Turn the lights on)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Sweet dream or a beautiful nightmare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
  Somebody pinch me, your love's too good to be true[/tab]
(Turn the lights on)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  My guilty pleasure, I ain't going no where[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Baby long as you're here I'll be floating on air[/tab]
'Cause you're my
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
You can be a sweet dream or a beautiful nightmare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]              
  Either way I don't wanna wake up from you[/tab]
(Turn the lights on)


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
I mention you when I say my prayers[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
I wrap you around all of my thoughts[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Boy you're my temporary high[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
I wish that when I wake up you're there[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]            
To wrap your arms around me for real[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  
  And tell me you'll stay by side[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                        
  Not even death can make us part[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
